test.name: Scenario 1: Add New Todo Task Successfully

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Text 'OK' did not appear in 8 seconds
kw.doc: Waits until the ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'OK' did not appear in 8 seconds

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Buy Milk' into text field 'id=com.avjindersinghsekhon.minimaltodo:id/userToDoEditText'
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device if it is currently visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Click Element
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: ValueError: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.ImageButton[contains(@resource-id, 'FloatingActionButton')]' did not match any elements.
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: ValueError: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.ImageButton[contains(@resource-id, 'FloatingActionButton')]' did not match any elements.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the ``text`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: ทดสอบการเพิ่ม Task "Buy Milk"

test.name: Scenario 2: Edit Existing Todo Task

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Text
kw.doc: Clicks the text identified by ``text``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Text
kw.doc: Clears the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Buy Milk Edited' into text field 'id=com.avjindersinghsekhon.minimaltodo:id/userToDoEditText'
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device if it is currently visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Click Element
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: ValueError: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.ImageButton[contains(@resource-id, 'FloatingActionButton')]' did not match any elements.
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: ValueError: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.ImageButton[contains(@resource-id, 'FloatingActionButton')]' did not match any elements.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the ``text`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: แก้ไขจาก Buy Milk เป็น Buy Milk Edited

test.name: Scenario 3: Delete Todo Task by Swiping

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Get Element Size
kw.doc: Returns the size of the element with the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Element Location
kw.doc: Returns the location of the element with the ``locator``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Swipe
kw.msg: Keyword 'Swipe' will not support int in ms for 'duration' in the future. Use timedelta with units ('ms' or 's') instead.
Keyword 'Swipe' converts the values of 'start_x', 'start_y', 'end_x', 'end_y' to integer.
Keyword 'Swipe' converts the values of 'start_x', 'start_y', 'end_x', 'end_y' to integer.
Keyword 'Swipe' converts the values of 'start_x', 'start_y', 'end_x', 'end_y' to integer.
Keyword 'Swipe' converts the values of 'start_x', 'start_y', 'end_x', 'end_y' to integer.
kw.doc: Swipes from one point to another point, for an optional ``duration``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the ``text`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

test.doc: ทดสอบการลบ Task โดยการปัดซ้าย (Swipe Left)

errors.msg: Keyword 'Swipe' will not support int in ms for 'duration' in the future. Use timedelta with units ('ms' or 's') instead.
Keyword 'Swipe' converts the values of 'start_x', 'start_y', 'end_x', 'end_y' to integer.
Keyword 'Swipe' converts the values of 'start_x', 'start_y', 'end_x', 'end_y' to integer.
Keyword 'Swipe' converts the values of 'start_x', 'start_y', 'end_x', 'end_y' to integer.
Keyword 'Swipe' converts the values of 'start_x', 'start_y', 'end_x', 'end_y' to integer.
